prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm lamplight falls across the pale page of an open codex and a single fingertip, deep shadow at the edges; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
An extreme close view of the pale page of an open early codex, a single weathered fingertip resting beneath one faint line, the bound block of the book visible at the lower edge, warm lamplight crossing the vellum surface, deep shadow surrounding. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the open codex page, the fingertip resting on a line.

Cut to insert — the fingertip beneath the faint line.

Cut to macro detail — the pale vellum grain in the lamplight.

Cut to lower framing — the bound block of the book.

Cut to insert — the curled corner of the page.

Cut to macro detail — the warm lamplight on the page surface.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the open codex page and the resting fingertip.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Solemn recognition.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — open codex page, fingertip resting on a line
Cut to insert — the fingertip beneath the faint line
Cut to macro detail — pale vellum grain in the lamplight
Cut to lower framing — the bound block of the book

Cut to macro detail — warm lamplight on the page surface
Return to full composition, end hold on the codex page and resting fingertip
